title: The Survival Game Tightens
description: Enel’s mantra lets him observe and judge the fighters as the priests, Shandia, and Straw Hats struggle through separate battles.
scene: Across pages 0, 1, 2, 3, this scene centers on Luffy, Wyper, Enel, Chopper, Zoro. Enel’s mantra lets him observe and judge the fighters as the priests, Shandia, and Straw Hats struggle through separate battles.

dialogue.speaker: Enel
dialogue.text: I am one of enel's almighty priests!

dialogue.speaker: Chopper
dialogue.text: But you are the one sinking!!!!

dialogue.speaker: Wyper
dialogue.text: Fool. I am immune to this swamp!!

summary: Enel’s mantra lets him observe and judge the fighters as the priests, Shandia, and Straw Hats struggle through separate battles.
